name: testTheVisibilityOfTheStatusSelectorOptions
description: Verify that user can see selector Status Options
descriptionHtml: Verify that user can see selector Status Options

steps.name: Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

testStage.description: Verify that user can see selector Status Options

steps.name: Verify: Selector Status Options are visible
Verify: Default selected option in status selector is 'ALL'
